description_long: This cabinetry set features a modern, two-part design with a long, horizontal base cabinet and a matching wall-mounted upper cabinet. The exterior is finished with horizontal wood slats and black surfaces, giving it a sleek, contemporary look. The base unit includes a built-in sink, a stovetop, and several drawers and doors, some of which are partially open to reveal interior shelving. The upper cabinet is divided into multiple compartments, with a metallic range hood integrated into the center section. The cabinetry is accented with metallic hardware and trim, and the countertop appears to be a solid, dark material. This set is suitable for use in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces where both storage and workspace are needed.
description: A modern, two-part cabinetry set with wood slats, black surfaces, and metallic accents, featuring a base unit with sink and stovetop and a matching wall-mounted upper cabinet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry set, including the sink, stovetop, drawers, and upper compartments with metallic range hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and thickness of the cabinetry, with minimal visible detail except the profile of the countertop and upper cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels and the full width of both the base and upper cabinets, with visible structural supports and hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the cabinetry, similar to view 1, with the sink and stovetop edges just visible.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet and wall cabinet set
